description: You are an astronomer at a research institute. Your team's Python pipeline for detecting exoplanet transits from light curve data is failing to detect Kepler-8b due to 5 mathematical and logic bugs introduced during a recent modularization. The code is at /home/ga/workspace/exoplanet_pipeline/. Fix all 5 bugs across the pipeline modules so that the pipeline successfully recovers Kepler-8b's period and transit depth. Save the final parameters to results/planet_parameters.json.
